mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WOORIDO.NOTIFICATIONS ( ID, USER_ID, TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, LINK_URL, RELATED_ENTITY_TYPE, RELATED_ENTITY_ID, IS_READ, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{linkUrl}, #{relatedEntityType}, #{relatedEntityId}, 'N', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE WOORIDO.NOTIFICATIONS SET IS_READ = 'Y', READ_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE WOORIDO.NOTIFICATIONS SET IS_READ = 'Y', READ_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_READ = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WOORIDO.NOTIFICATIONS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_READ = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE WOORIDO.NOTIFICATIONS SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, LINK_URL = #{linkUrl}, RELATED_ENTITY_TYPE = #{relatedEntityType}, RELATED_ENTITY_ID = #{relatedEntityId}, IS_READ = 'N', READ_AT = NULL WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, USER_ID, PUSH_ENABLED, EMAIL_ENABLED, SMS_ENABLED, VOTE_NOTIFICATION, MEETING_NOTIFICATION, EXPENSE_NOTIFICATION, SNS_NOTIFICATION, SYSTEM_NOTIFICATION, QUIET_HOURS_ENABLED, QUIET_HOURS_START, QUIET_HOURS_END, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM WOORIDO.NOTIFICATION_SETTINGS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE WOORIDO.NOTIFICATION_SETTINGS SET PUSH_ENABLED = #{pushEnabled, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, EMAIL_ENABLED = #{emailEnabled, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, SMS_ENABLED = #{smsEnabled, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, VOTE_NOTIFICATION = #{voteNotification, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, MEETING_NOTIFICATION = #{meetingNotification, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, EXPENSE_NOTIFICATION = #{expenseNotification, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, SNS_NOTIFICATION = #{snsNotification, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, SYSTEM_NOTIFICATION = #{systemNotification, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, QUIET_HOURS_ENABLED = #{quietHoursEnabled, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, QUIET_HOURS_START = #{quietHoursStart}, QUIET_HOURS_END = #{quietHoursEnd}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WOORIDO.NOTIFICATION_SETTINGS ( ID, USER_ID, PUSH_ENABLED, EMAIL_ENABLED, SMS_ENABLED, VOTE_NOTIFICATION, MEETING_NOTIFICATION, EXPENSE_NOTIFICATION, SNS_NOTIFICATION, SYSTEM_NOTIFICATION, QUIET_HOURS_ENABLED, QUIET_HOURS_START, QUIET_HOURS_END, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{pushEnabled, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, #{emailEnabled, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, #{smsEnabled, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, #{voteNotification, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, #{meetingNotification, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, #{expenseNotification, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, #{snsNotification, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, #{systemNotification, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, #{quietHoursEnabled, typeHandler=com.woorido.common.handler.BooleanYnTypeHandler}, #{quietHoursStart}, #{quietHoursEnd}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
